data.name: 5GDeployment Planner

data.description: Optimizes 911 dispatch operations by prioritizing calls based on severity, location proximity, and available units, reducing response times through intelligent unit assignment and real-time rerouting capabilities.

data.name: A/B Test Analyzer
data.description: Analyzes A/B test results with proper statistical methods, determining significance and recommending next actions.
data.author: TestSignal

data.name: ABTestAnalyzer Agent
data.description: Analyzes A/B test results with statistical rigor by calculating effect sizes, confidence intervals, and Bayesian posterior probabilities, recommending decisions with quantified uncertainty for product experimentation.

data.name: ABTesting Analyst
data.description: Analyzes A/B test results by calculating statistical significance, segmenting performance by audience characteristics, and recommending winning variants with confidence intervals for data-driven marketing decisions.

data.name: APIDoc Generator

data.description: Designs API gateway configurations by analyzing service architectures, authentication requirements, and rate limiting policies to generate optimized gateway rules that balance security with developer experience.

data.name: APISpec Generator
data.description: Automatically generates OpenAPI specifications and corresponding server stubs from natural language API descriptions, ensuring RESTful best practices and consistent endpoint documentation across microservices.

data.name: Accessibility Linter
data.description: Scans generated UI code for WCAG compliance violations, automatically suggesting and applying fixes for missing ARIA labels, keyboard navigation gaps, color contrast issues, and semantic HTML improvements.
data.author: Code GenerationAI Labs

data.name: AccessibilityAdapter Agent
data.description: Adapts educational content for accessibility by generating alternative text, captioning media, restructuring documents for screen readers, and ensuring WCAG compliance for inclusive learning experiences.

data.name: ActuarialModel Assistant
